arguments.query: Lantern Theatre Belden official archive organization

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:belden-arts.fixture Lantern Theatre opening program seating capacity

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary source for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than relying on its search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report the original capacity as 642 seats and cite the fetched archival program.
Do not rely on the tourism guide or enthusiast site.

prompt: Determine which organization maintains the official archive for the Lantern Theatre in Belden, then fetch a primary archival program that states the theatre’s original seating capacity. Do not use tourism pages, fan histories, or search-result snippets as evidence.

search_1.query: Lantern Theatre Belden official archive organization

results.title: Official site — Belden Municipal Arts Archive

search_2.query: site:belden-arts.fixture Lantern Theatre opening program seating capacity

results.title: Commentary on Lantern Theatre Opening Program

fetch_1.title: Lantern Theatre Opening Program
fetch_1.content: The opening program describes the new Lantern Theatre as a 642-seat municipal playhouse. The inaugural performance was The Harbor Bell.
